3123710.name: Space Reign Soundtrack
3123710.description:
You've tested your pilot skills and your tactical prowess while listening to a full ensemble of 30 tracks, composed and designed from scratch specifically for Space Reign, blending Industrial, Electronic, Rock and Classical themes in such way that you felt right in the seat of a spacecraft.

Now all of them are here, available for you to listen at your own leisure, even while you're away from your game.

Each track is available in high-quality MP3 format, ensuring maximum compatibility with your day-to-day music player.
